name: Cheeseburger Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large pot and drain excess fat.
2. Stir in the chopped onion, celery, green pepper, beef base, and salt.
3. Add 1 1/2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a simmer.
4. Cover and cook the vegetables until they are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, blend together half a cup of milk and three tablespoons of flour.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture into the pot with the remaining milk, stirring constantly.
7. Continue cooking and stirring until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
8. Add the shredded cheddar cheese to the chowder and stir until it melts completely.
